title: campylospermum nutans
intro: Campylospermum nutans, a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, is a small tree or shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Campylospermum nutans include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Campylospermum nutans is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in traditional herbal preparations.
